title: Fix: Leaflet map destroyed and recreated on every question
description: OpenSeaMapContainer.tsx:146 init effect has deps [center, zoom, onMapClick]; every question changes center, so cleanup runs map.remove() and a new map re-initializes, refetching all tiles. Init once with [] deps; the existing setView/fitBounds effect handles repositioning. Also avoid clearing/rebuilding all 161 markers each question - only the highlighted marker's icon changes; diff or just update the affected markers. Remove the dead hiddenMarks prop (never populated) and its call sites.
close_reason: Map initialized once, markers diffed by setIcon, hiddenMarks removed

title: Fix: side effects inside setGameState updater functions
description: GameController.tsx:134-164 (timeout path) and :181-210 (handleGuessAnswer) call setLastResult/setShowResult/setTimeout(generateNewQuestion) INSIDE setGameState updaters. Updaters must be pure; StrictMode double-invokes them, risking double question-advance. Refactor: compute next state, then perform side effects at top level.

title: Fix: beginner pool exhaustion ends game early with celebration screen
description: Beginner difficulty pool is only 13 of 161 marks (keyword filter in gpxParser.ts:53). generateGuessQuestion (gameLogic.ts:120) adds ALL option IDs to usedSet, consuming up to 6 marks/question. When availableMarks < numberOfOptions the generator throws; GameController.tsx:92 catches and sets gameEnded, showing the 'Game Complete!' celebration screen mid-game. Data-load failures hit the same screen. Fix: only mark the target as used; add a proper error state distinct from game completion; consider widening/redefining the beginner pool.

title: Fix: 'Show hints' setting has no effect
description: GuessMode.tsx:116 shows the sponsor hint whenever targetMark.sponsor exists. config.hintEnabled is never passed down from GameController or checked. Fix: thread hintEnabled through GameController into GuessMode and gate the hint display on it.

title: Test: GameController coverage (timer, timeout, scoring flow, end-game, pool exhaustion)
description: Zero coverage on GameController where the riskiest logic lives. Add vitest + RTL tests with fake timers: timer countdown/timeout path, answer scoring + streaks, 10-question end, error state on pool exhaustion. Also test generateGuessQuestion pool-exhaustion path.

title: UX: Play Again should reset state, not window.location.reload()
description: GameController.tsx:357 reloads the page, dropping the player to the start screen. Reset game state (or remount GameController via key) to start a new game directly; offer a separate 'Change Settings' action to return to the start screen.

title: Feature: persist game stats and high scores to localStorage
description: App.tsx handleGameEnd only console.logs. Persist game history/high score/best streak to localStorage and surface high score on start + results screens. Remove the console.log.

title: UX: restyle results screen and in-game header to match yacht-club aesthetic
description: Start screen uses navy #1B2A4A / gold #C9A962 / serif yacht-club style (commit 7b13c21) but the game-over screen (GameController.tsx:272-383) and in-game header still use the old blue-gradient + emoji style. Restyle for consistency.

title: Refactor: extract QUESTIONS_PER_GAME constant (hardcoded 10 in 3 places)
description: Hardcoded question count: GameController.tsx:156 and :202 (>= 10) and ScoreDisplay.tsx ('/10' twice). Extract a single constant (e.g. in constants/app.ts).

title: Fix: validate localStorage gameConfig on load
description: App.tsx:15 JSON.parses cached config with no shape validation (only timeLimit is patched). Stale schema (e.g. missing proximityMode) propagates undefined fields. Validate/merge with defaults field-by-field.

title: Fix: Best Streak on results screen shows current streak, not best
description: GameController.tsx:318 renders gameState.streak (current streak, 0 if last answer wrong/timed out) labelled 'Best Streak'. Track bestStreak in GameState and display it.

title: Chore: dead code cleanup
description: Remove: getMarkHint + progressive hints (gameLogic.ts:171, only used in tests), GameState.currentMark/options (never set), ScoreDisplay unreachable mode branch, dead avg-center logic GameController.tsx:81-87 (fitBounds branch always wins), unnecessary eslint-disable exhaustive-deps comments, config.openSeaMapEnabled in question-regeneration deps (GameController.tsx:124), crypto.getRandomValues modulo-bias helper (plain Math.random suffices for a game), worker/index.ts /api stub, map.html prototype at repo root (verify unreferenced first).

title: Fix: distractor options ignore difficulty pool
description: generateGuessQuestion draws wrong options from ALL 161 marks regardless of difficulty, so beginner distractors can be obscure sponsored marks that are trivially eliminable. Prefer distractors from the active difficulty pool, falling back to all marks.

title: Fix: deadline-based timer to avoid setInterval drift and per-second effect re-creation
description: GameController timer effect deps include timeRemaining, so the interval is torn down/recreated every second, and setInterval drift skews displayed time. Use an endTime ref and compute remaining from Date.now().
